name: Interior & Exterior Wash
description: Complete interior and exterior cleaning to remove dirt, grime, and buildup for a spotless finish inside and out.

name: Paint Correction
description: Remove swirl marks, scratches, and oxidation to restore your paint to a mirror-like, showroom-quality finish.

name: Ceramic Coating
description: Long-lasting nano-ceramic protection that repels water, UV rays, and contaminants for years of pristine shine.

name: Headlight Restoration
description: Restores clarity and improves night visibility, removing yellowing and oxidation from lenses.

name: Engine Cleaning
description: Thorough engine bay degreasing and cleaning for a pristine engine that performs and looks its best.

name: Leather Protection
description: Deep conditioning and protection treatment that restores suppleness, color, and durability to leather surfaces.

name: Stain Removal
description: Advanced treatment to eliminate tough stains from upholstery, carpets, and surfaces — results guaranteed.

name: Full Detailing Package
description: The complete treatment — interior deep clean, exterior wash, paint correction, and protection — all in one premium package.

name: Dash Cam Installation
description: Professional installation of dash cameras for continuous recording, impact detection, and night vision. Wi-Fi and cloud options available.
